sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka mai ah lungkham buaina, Bawlsiatna gensiatna ahi,
Dawimangpa leh Satan khut in hong pom hang
Jehovah Shalom ka hong ngak ee,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kisap ding bang mah lau keing

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong khemna dan ka telsiang ta,
Sihna ih pawl hilo hi, panpih kei un,
Jehovah Shalom in hong om pih.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lau ken sihna zong lau ken,
Lungmuantak in om phot mai in,
Na mai-ah ka ding zel ding a ci.
